caption: A woman with her hair in a high bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio setting. She is speaking into a black microphone positioned in front of her. In the background, a black screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text, while a smaller sign above says "Employees Only". To her left, a logo featuring the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" is visible. As the scene progresses, the woman's facial expressions shift as she speaks, and she uses hand gestures to emphasize her points, moving her hands in front of her chest. The background and equipment remain static throughout the sequence, focusing the attention on her speaking and gesturing.
